Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class SizeVerifierImpl

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberVerifier<SizeVerifier,SizeValidator,Integer>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.SizeVerifierImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<SizeVerifier,Integer>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<SizeVerifier,Integer>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<SizeVerifier,Integer>, ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<SizeVerifier,Integer>, SizeVerifier
public final class SizeVerifierImpl extends AbstractNumberVerifier<SizeVerifier,SizeValidator,Integer> implements SizeVerifier
Default implementation of a SizeVerifier.

    • isNotZero

      public SizeVerifier isNotZero()
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleNumberVerifier
      Ensures that the actual value is not zero. -0.0 is considered to be equal to zero.

      Returns:
      the updated verifier
